title: Tasia Ntwari
content:
People.ContactEmail tntwari@mccarthy.ca
- University of Calgary
Tasia received her Juris Doctor from the University of Calgary in 2025. She also holds a Bachelor of Commerce with distinction in Supply Chain Management from the University of Calgary.
During law school, Tasia was an active member of the student community, serving in executive roles with both the Society of  Law Students and the Black Law Students Association. She also spent a semester abroad in France, refining her legal French skills and broadening her perspective on international law.
Prior to pursuing law, Tasia worked as a consultant with a large professional services firm in Montreal. Tasia is fluent in both French and English.

- Publication Public Procurement 2025 Year in Review March 2, 2026
